name: Deployment
whatItDoes: Launches 2 or more independent tasks as parallel subagents. Each works on its own files without conflicts. Saves wall-clock time by doing multiple things simultaneously.
whenToUse: When facing independent tasks that don't share state or have sequential dependencies.
exampleUse: DevToolkit Tasks 2, 3, and 4 ran in parallel (types, tool content, learning path).
